label: Esports opener
prompt: An opener for a late-night esports show called NOVA RIFT - high energy, aimed at a young gaming audience.

label: Cooking title
prompt: A title card for a relaxed Sunday-morning cooking series called Sunday Kitchen - warm and inviting.

label: Awards reveal
prompt: The winner reveal for a music awards public vote - the winner is Aurora Vane. Make it feel like a big moment.

label: Transparent lower-third
prompt: A lower-third for a documentary interview: the guest's name on one line and their role and institution on a second, smaller line. Transparent background - this sits over footage. Slide the strap in from the left, hold it readable, then take it out.

label: Long title
prompt: A title card for a public-affairs documentary called THE LONG ROAD TO WESTMINSTER BRIDGE - the full title has to be readable, it is not a subtitle.

label: Single-word hero
prompt: A stark full-frame title that says only LANDFALL, for a storm-coverage cold open.

label: Logo sting with asset
prompt: A short channel ident that resolves onto the supplied logo, with the words ON AIR beneath it.
